mapper.insert: INSERT INTO HEALTH_INTERVENTION_LOGS ( PLAN_ID, USER_ID, TRIGGER_TYPE, SEVERITY, RISK_LEVEL, SUMMARY, EVIDENCE, ACTIONS, MESSAGE_ID, STATUS, EXPIRES_AT, CREATED_AT, UPDATED_AT ) VALUES ( #{planId}, #{userId}, #{triggerType}, #{severity}, #{riskLevel}, #{summary}, #{evidence}, #{actions}, #{messageId}, #{status}, #{expiresAt}, NOW(), NOW() )
mapper.select: SELECT PLAN_ID AS planId, USER_ID AS userId, TRIGGER_TYPE AS triggerType, SEVERITY AS severity, RISK_LEVEL AS riskLevel, SUMMARY AS summary, EVIDENCE AS evidence, ACTIONS AS actions, MESSAGE_ID AS messageId, STATUS AS status, EXPIRES_AT AS expiresAt, RESOLVED_AT AS resolvedAt, CREATED_AT AS createdAt, UPDATED_AT AS updatedAt FROM HEALTH_INTERVENTION_LOGS WHERE USER_ID = #{userId} AND STATUS = 'active' AND (EXPIRES_AT IS NULL OR EXPIRES_AT > NOW()) ORDER BY CREATED_AT DESC LIMIT 1

SELECT PLAN_ID AS planId, USER_ID AS userId, TRIGGER_TYPE AS triggerType, SEVERITY AS severity, RISK_LEVEL AS riskLevel, SUMMARY AS summary, EVIDENCE AS evidence, ACTIONS AS actions, MESSAGE_ID AS messageId, STATUS AS status, EXPIRES_AT AS expiresAt, RESOLVED_AT AS resolvedAt, CREATED_AT AS createdAt, UPDATED_AT AS updatedAt FROM HEALTH_INTERVENTION_LOGS WHERE PLAN_ID = #{planId} LIMIT 1
SELECT COUNT(1) FROM HEALTH_INTERVENTION_LOGS WHERE USER_ID = #{userId} AND CREATED_AT >= #{since}
SELECT COUNT(1) FROM HEALTH_INTERVENTION_LOGS WHERE USER_ID = #{userId} AND SEVERITY IN ('warning', 'critical') AND DATE(CREATED_AT) = CURDATE()
mapper.update: UPDATE HEALTH_INTERVENTION_LOGS SET STATUS = 'resolved', RESOLVED_AT = NOW(), UPDATED_AT = NOW() WHERE PLAN_ID = #{planId} AND STATUS = 'active'
UPDATE HEALTH_INTERVENTION_LOGS SET STATUS = 'expired', UPDATED_AT = NOW() WHERE USER_ID = #{userId} AND STATUS = 'active' AND EXPIRES_AT IS NOT NULL AND EXPIRES_AT <= #{now}
mapper.select: SELECT PLAN_ID AS planId, USER_ID AS userId, TRIGGER_TYPE AS triggerType, SEVERITY AS severity, RISK_LEVEL AS riskLevel, SUMMARY AS summary, EVIDENCE AS evidence, ACTIONS AS actions, MESSAGE_ID AS messageId, STATUS AS status, EXPIRES_AT AS expiresAt, RESOLVED_AT AS resolvedAt, CREATED_AT AS createdAt, UPDATED_AT AS updatedAt FROM HEALTH_INTERVENTION_LOGS WHERE USER_ID = #{userId} ORDER BY CREATED_AT DESC LIMIT #{limit}
